project_type: Flutter mobile app - Fantasy Cricket Platform
build_system: Flutter SDK (flutter pub get, flutter build)
verification_instructions: Run flutter analyze to check for compilation errors. Cannot run flutter build since INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode prevents downloading dependencies.
setup_instructions: flutter pub get (but network is INTEGRATIONS_ONLY so this cannot run)
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install packages, pull images, or make external HTTP calls. Validation limited to static analysis of code structure and ensuring no import/syntax errors. Use AST-level validation by reading code.
contribution_requirements: Follow Clean Architecture pattern. Features in lib/features/<name>/. State management with Riverpod. Navigation with GoRouter. Supabase for data, Firebase for auth.
key_patterns: Each feature has data/domain/presentation layers. Screens are ConsumerWidget or ConsumerStatefulWidget. Providers in domain/providers/. Repositories in data/repositories/. Router in lib/core/router/app_router.dart. Bottom nav in lib/shared/widgets/main_scaffold.dart with FloatingBottomNavBar. Admin screens use AdminNavDrawer.
directory_structure: lib/core/ (router, theme, network, storage, utils), lib/features/ (admin, auth, contests, fantasy, groups, home, matches, notifications, profile, wallet), lib/shared/ (widgets, components)
